hero.name: Mohamed Ayman
hero.tagline: I craft digital experiences that live at the intersection of design and engineering.

about.title:
Turning complex
problems into elegant
solutions.
about.bio1: I'm a Frontend Developer with 1.5+ years of experience crafting responsive, performant web applications. My passion lies in creating seamless user experiences through clean, maintainable code and modern design principles.
about.bio2: When I'm not building interfaces or optimizing performance, you'll find me contributing to open source, exploring emerging frontend technologies, or sharing knowledge with fellow developers.

projects.title:
Projects that
speak for themselves.
projects.subtitle: A selection of work I'm proud of — from concept to deployment.

items.title: Taleora
items.description: A high-performance, bilingual (Arabic/English) e-commerce platform for children's books. Features a custom RTL-supported UI, secure Stripe integration, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory and audit logging.

items.title: Sharek - Digital Business Cards SaaS
items.description: A SaaS platform for creating, managing, and sharing smart digital business cards with corporate dashboard features.

items.title: DentalSaaS - Clinic Management System
items.description: A scalable SaaS platform for dental clinics offering an all-in-one management solution. It features interactive dental charting, smart appointment scheduling, automated patient follow-ups via WhatsApp/SMS, and comprehensive financial tracking.

items.title: EduPlatform - Digital SAT & ACT Prep
items.description: A comprehensive educational platform for standardized test preparation (SAT, EST & ACT). Features timed practice tests with Desmos calculator integration, interactive quiz competitions with real-time VS matchmaking, score analytics with detailed breakdowns, video-based learning courses, and a full admin dashboard for content, subscription, and media management.

items.title: FundX - Investment & Equity Crowdfunding
items.description: A comprehensive equity crowdfunding platform that connects investors with promising startups. Features interactive investment portfolios, real-time equity negotiation, customized project discovery based on user preferences, and downloadable financial reports.

items.title: Masfer Al-Atifi - Law Firm Website
items.description: A premium, multi-page Arabic (RTL) website for a leading law firm in Riyadh. Features a cinematic hero with video background, smooth AOS scroll animations, an interactive services showcase, a Swiper-powered blog carousel, founder spotlight, and a full contact system with consultation booking.

skills.title:
Technologies I
live and breathe.
skills.subtitle: A toolkit refined through years of real-world engineering.

items.description: Built and architected a bilingual (English/Arabic RTL) e-commerce platform for a children's book and sticker store. Developed a magical, animation-driven UI, a secure checkout flow, protected user profiles, and a comprehensive admin dashboard with audit logging.
Developed foundational components for scalable web applications. Optimized performance using SSR and SSG in Next.js and implemented secure form handling with Zod schema validation.
Built and maintained over 30 reusable UI components with Redux Toolkit. Improved application speed through code splitting and lazy loading while delivering pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces.
